title: Leakage-safe pre-issue weather-state auxiliary model for group 3
rationale: The strongest public model is bottlenecked by group-3 regime shifts. Public Open-Meteo historical forecasts provide weather states strictly before each BARAM issue time; 6/12/24-hour lags add the synoptic initial condition without test SCADA, future-valid weather, observations, or reanalysis.
expected_signal: An external-feature LightGBM must beat an identical no-external control directionally, then an H1-selected blend changing at most 25% of rows and moving p95 at most 1.5% must improve locked H2 score, 1-NMAE, and FICR across seeds, months, and day bootstrap.
risk_notes: External data provenance and publication-time safety are material. Only values at least six hours before data_available_kst_dtm are joined, and the source file, URL, license, period, coordinates, and SHA-256 are retained.
